purpose: 稳定登记可长期保留的验证报告；volatile artifacts 只作为报告引用的原始输出，不作为唯一证据。

identityPolicy.commit: 报告或验证实际执行/来源内容所绑定的 Git commit；稳定报告文件自身由 sha256 独立保护，若原始报告声明了 runCommit，必须在 notes 中区分并保持同源。
identityPolicy.runSessionId: 实际 benchmark、probe、CI 或人工 session 的身份；历史报告未记录时使用 null，不得推造。
identityPolicy.completeState: 只有同时捕获 commit、runSessionId、硬件、命令、稳定报告和 SHA256 的条目才能标记 complete。

entries.hardware: Windows build 26100; AMD Ryzen 7 5800X; AMD Radeon RX 7900 XT; .NET SDK 10.0.108; win-x64; two 2560x1440 displays both at 144 DPI (150%); PixelEngine real IME, Build And Run, docking and WGC probes
entries.command: Computer Use real Play/Pause/Step, Chinese IME candidate/focus cleanup, Build And Run and independent Player, Project/Inspector undock-move-redock, same-UserData restart, Reset Layout and same-DPI cross-monitor routes; 13 test projects sequentially; solution Release build; task catalog and evidence index validation
entries.notes: Scene explicit Brush and bounds, global shortcuts, shared per-HWND IME, fixed Build Settings footer and Build And Run, ordered pointer coordinates and staged mouse release are verified. Project/Inspector docking, restart persistence and same-DPI cross-monitor rendering passed; different-DPI hardware, Explorer cross-window pointer drag and final Unity matrix remain, so EDITOR-003 stays active.

entries.hardware: Windows build 26100; AMD Ryzen 7 5800X; AMD Radeon RX 7900 XT; .NET SDK 10.0.108; win-x64; PixelEngine real authoritative Scene world, Brush, W/E/R, Play and Stop WGC probes
entries.command: Computer Use real PixelEngine Demo authoritative 640x360 Scene world, empty Brush write, W/E/R, approximately 18-second Play and Stop restore route; 13 test projects sequentially; isolated allocation retry; solution Release build; task catalog and evidence index validation
entries.notes: Explicit authoring-world provider, runtime-authoring cell parity, independent Scene BGRA8 cell texture, Brush and snapshot invalidation, transform-aware empty-object marker and pre-Scripting audio initialization are verified. Real Editor showed the 640x360 terrain, painted a visible 13-cell hole, switched W/E/R, survived Play and retained the hole after Stop; different-DPI hardware, Explorer cross-window pointer drag and final Unity matrix remain, so EDITOR-003 stays active.

entries.hardware: Windows build 26100; AMD Ryzen 7 5800X; AMD Radeon RX 7900 XT; .NET SDK 10.0.108; win-x64; PixelEngine real Scene gizmo, Inspector drag, Project preview/audio, Play reentry, dirty close and framebuffer probes
entries.command: Computer Use real Transform label drag, Player Scene gizmo, Project texture/audio/script preview and playback, Reset Layout, Play-Stop-Play and native dirty close; scripted hierarchy/gameview/menu/default-workbench/preferences/project-reopen probes; 13 test projects through tools/run-tests.ps1; solution Release build; task catalog and evidence index validation
entries.notes: Scene clipping, W/E/R gizmos, Inspector drag and header hit regions, Play reentry and Game UI viewport confinement, Scene-owned Brush overlay, typed Project preview, panel focus, narrow Project layout and native dirty close are verified. Probe false-green, build child-pipe deadlock and telemetry preview drift were also fixed; different-DPI hardware, Explorer cross-window pointer drag and independent reviewer remain, so EDITOR-003 stays active.

entries.hardware: Microsoft Windows 11 专业版 build 26100; AMD Ryzen 7 5800X 8-Core Processor; AMD Radeon RX 7900 XT driver 32.0.31021.5001; .NET SDK 10.0.108; .NET 10.0.8; win-x64
entries.command: dotnet build PixelEngine.sln -c Release --no-restore --disable-build-servers -m:1; full UI/Hosting/Demo Release tests; PIXELENGINE_RENDERING_GL_SMOKE=1 UI RmlUi/Hosting/Demo native tests; dotnet run --project demo/PixelEngine.Demo/PixelEngine.Demo.csproj -c Release --no-build --no-restore -- --no-hot-reload --window-ticks 40 --scripted-window-demo --content demo/PixelEngine.Demo/content --scene scenes/lava-mine.scene --capture-frame artifacts/ui004-node6/player-rmlui-commit.bmp --log-dir artifacts/ui004-node6/player-rmlui-commit-logs; tools/validate-task-catalog.ps1; git diff --check
entries.notes: Explicit scene v3 three-Canvas Demo dogfood, all CanvasScaler modes, RmlUi Player, legacy GUI exclusion, Escape pause automation, native desktop GL rendering and commit-bound framebuffer are verified. Windows control discovered the Player but could not activate the desktop GL window, so no real-input pass is claimed; DPI/window-mode matrix, reviewer and clean final output remain pending and UI-004 stays active.

entries.hardware: GitHub-hosted windows-latest for run 29166221230; win-x64 build/test/verify-publish and benchmark/disassembly; win-arm64 build-only

entries.notes: 远端 run 29166221230 在完整 SHA 1148ca87 上确认 win-x64 build/test、13-TRX 聚合、disassembly、benchmark regression、verify-publish 与 win-arm64 build-only 全部成功；1776 total、1739 executed/passed、0 failed、37 个 native GPU scope NotExecuted。真实 ANGLE runner 仍由 TEST-003 阻塞，Linux/macOS 长期矩阵由 CI-003 跟踪。
